Interface ITerrainEdit3

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members used to modify and build a terrain.

[Guid("A7E67808-29D5-4DD9-8696-06993FA838B4")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITerrainEdit3 : ITerrainEdit2, ITerrainEdit
